name: Stok & Associates, P.A. v. Citibank, N.A.
question: Under the Federal Arbitration Act, should a party be required to demonstrate prejudice after the opposing party waives its contractual right to arbitrate by participating in litigation?
description: A case the Court dismissed, which would have considered whether under the Federal Arbitration Act, a party is required to demonstrate prejudice after the opposing party waives its contractual right to arbitrate by participating in litigation.
